title: DL7 9FD, Cawingredients Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/UP3937FW/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Cawingredients Limited Installation name: Caw House Permit number: EPR/UP3937FW/V008  "
